title: actaea americana var. alba
intro: Actaea americana var. alba, also known as White Baneberry, is a perennial plant native to Eastern North America, characterized by its white berries and white or greenish flowers. The medicinal properties of White Baneberry include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. White Baneberry can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
